name: ClaimGuard MCP
tagline: AI-powered claim verification & deep research — agents pay USDC per call to verify claims, fact-check articles, score confidence, and conduct multi-step research.
description: ClaimGuard MCP is an x402-monetized Model Context Protocol server that gives AI agents on-demand claim verification, source checking, entity research, URL fact-checking, and deep research — all backed by LLM reasoning. Every tool call costs USDC, paid instantly on-chain to the server owner. No subscriptions, no API keys for agents — pure pay-per-use micropayments.

tools.name: summarize_topic
tools.description: Quick AI-powered factual summary of any topic — returns key facts, confidence score, and caveats.

tools.name: get_confidence_score
tools.description: Calibrated 0–100 confidence score for any claim, with verdict, supporting points, and contradicting points.

tools.name: verify_claim
tools.description: Structured claim verification — returns a true/false/unverified verdict, confidence score, and evidence summary.

tools.name: check_sources
tools.description: Fetches up to 3 URLs and uses AI to determine whether each supports or contradicts a claim, with relevance scores.

tools.name: research_entities
tools.description: Extracts named entities (people, orgs, places, events) from text and returns verified descriptions and key facts.

tools.name: fact_check_url
tools.description: Fetches an article or web page and AI fact-checks the claims within it — per-claim verdicts and overall credibility rating.

tools.name: deep_research
tools.description: Multi-step AI deep research on any topic — structured plan, findings, key takeaways, citations, and confidence level.
